agent.title: AI personalization agent
agent.description: Configure the model and prompt: AI changes only subject and greeting.
agent.infoAlert: The agent changes only subject and greeting from the contact profile. Body, signature and legal footer are composed without the LLM. No website fetch and no RAG.
agent.maxTokensHint: Token limit for subject + greeting. For CPU, 150–400 is typical.
agent.timeoutHint: How long to wait for the model. Default is 7 minutes (6–8 min window for CPU).
agent.loadError: Failed to load AI agent settings
agent.saveError: Failed to save AI agent settings
agent.previewHint: Test the result on one contact before a mass send.
agent.previewNoContacts: No selected contacts. Go back to the contacts list or Create broadcast tab with ids in the URL.
agent.historyHint: Click an item to open the contact chat. If drafts are prepared, the text will appear in the input field.
agent.historyEmpty: No generated messages yet. Run a preview or prepare drafts.

models.title: Local Ollama models for the agent
models.hint: Pick a light model for your server, download it from Ollama, and assign it to the broadcast agent. Links open the official ollama.com library.
models.disconnected: Ollama is unavailable — model install is disabled
models.customHint: Tag name as in the Ollama library, e.g. qwen2.5:1.5b
models.installing: Installing {model}… this may take several minutes
models.installTimeout: Install of {model} did not finish in time. Check Ollama and refresh the list.
models.selectedNeedSave: Model {model} filled into the form. Click Save to apply.
models.desc15: Best starting point for the broadcast agent on a VDS without GPU.
models.desc3: Slightly better than 1.5b, slightly slower — if you have spare RAM.
models.desc05: Lightest option for testing. Personalization quality is lower.
models.descLlama: Qwen alternative. Russian is usually weaker than Qwen at the same size.

broadcast.aiPersonalizeAlert: Before sending, AI adapts only the subject and greeting from the contact profile. Body, signature and legal footer stay unchanged. Make sure the agent is enabled on the AI agent tab.
broadcast.aiAgentDisabledAlert: AI agent is disabled. Enable it on the AI agent tab, otherwise personalization is unavailable.

analytics.noDailyData: No broadcasts in the last 30 days

broadcast.noRecipients: No recipients selected. Go back to the contacts list and select users for broadcast.
broadcast.blockedSkipped: Blocked contacts ({count}) will be excluded from the broadcast.
broadcast.withoutEmailWarning: {count} recipients have no email — the message may only go to other channels or fail.
broadcast.infoAlert: Each email is sent to an individual recipient. Users will not see the broadcast list.
broadcast.subject: Email subject
broadcast.greetingHint: AI may adapt only greeting and subject. Use a neutral greeting — the name comes from the profile.
broadcast.messagePlaceholder: Offer text, CTA, links — without signature or disclaimer
broadcast.messageHint: AI does not change this block.
broadcast.signaturePlaceholder: Name, title, phone, email, company ID…
broadcast.signatureHint: Sender contacts. AI does not change this block.
broadcast.legalFooterPlaceholder: Informational notice, unsubscribe instructions, privacy consent…
broadcast.legalFooterHint: Legal block after the signature. AI does not change it. Shown small and light gray; each recipient also gets a unique anti-spam code.
broadcast.attachmentsHint: Files will be attached to each email.
broadcast.attachmentsPerRecipient: Each recipient gets a separate email with its own copy of the attachments.
broadcast.warmupAlert: Warm-up mode reduces spam risk: a small limit and noticeable delay between emails.
broadcast.attachmentsAlert: Attachments increase spam risk. Total size: {size}. For large files, use a link in the email body.
broadcast.checklist1: Check the subject line: avoid ALL CAPS, spam words, and aggressive promises.
broadcast.checklist2: Do not send to the entire list from a new domain: start with a small limit.
broadcast.checklist3: If you have an unsubscribe link or contact for opt-out, add it to the email body.
broadcast.backendQueueAlert: The broadcast runs on the server. You can close this tab — sending will continue.
broadcast.confirmStop: Stop this broadcast? Unsent messages will not be delivered.

parser.title: AI site parser bot
parser.description: Crawl the contact Link field (up to 5 pages), summarize with the model, and write into the contact comment.
parser.infoAlert: The parser downloads HTML/text only — no JS execution. It writes an AUTO ENRICH block into comment and keeps manual notes.
parser.noContacts: No contacts selected. Go back to the list and tick checkboxes — or save settings without running.
parser.intervalHint: Do not re-crawl a contact more often than every N days.
parser.keywordsHint: Comma-separated. Allow boosts URL priority; Deny excludes paths.
parser.emailFallback: If no link — use corporate email domain
parser.runHint: Crawls sites for selected contacts and updates comment. Contacts without a link (and without a corporate email when fallback is on) are skipped.
parser.selectForParser: Select users for the site parser
parser.guestsExcluded: Guest contacts are excluded from the parser. Select registered users.

composableErrors.noTokensForVoting: You have no tokens to vote. You must hold DLE tokens to participate in voting.
composableErrors.proposalAlreadyExecutedNoReExecute: Proposal has already been executed. Re-execution is not possible.
composableErrors.proposalCancelledNoExecute: Proposal has been cancelled. Execution is not possible.
composableErrors.proposalNotReadyForExecute: Proposal is not ready for execution (status: {status}). Execution is only allowed for proposals in "Ready for execution" status.
composableErrors.proposalAlreadyExecutedNoCancel: Proposal has already been executed. Cancellation is not possible.
composableErrors.proposalAlreadyCancelled: Proposal has already been cancelled. Repeated cancellation is not possible.
composableErrors.onlyInitiatorCanCancel: Only the proposal initiator can cancel it.
composableErrors.cancelDeadlineExpired: Cancellation deadline has passed. Cancellation is only allowed at least 15 minutes before voting ends.
composableErrors.noActiveChainsForCancel: No active chains found for cancellation
composableErrors.invalidProposalIdForChainCancel: Invalid proposal ID for chain {networkName} ({chainId}). chain.id={chainIdValue}, proposalId={proposalId}
composableErrors.invalidProposalIdForChain: Invalid proposal ID for chain {networkName} ({chainId}). chain.id={chainIdValue}, proposal.id={proposalId}
composableErrors.cancelFailedAllChains: Failed to cancel the proposal in any chain
composableErrors.noActiveChainsForVote: No active chains found for voting
composableErrors.noTokensInNetwork: No DLE tokens in network {networkName} for voting
composableErrors.voteRejectedByContract:
Voting rejected by the smart contract. Possible reasons:
• You have already voted on this proposal
• You have no tokens to vote
• The proposal is not active
• The voting period has expired
composableErrors.voteRejectedByContractWithNetwork:
Voting rejected by the smart contract. Possible reasons:
• You have already voted on this proposal
• You have no tokens to vote
• The proposal is not active
• The voting period has expired
• Wrong network for voting
composableErrors.transactionRejectedByContract: Transaction rejected by the smart contract (code: {code}). Check voting conditions.
composableErrors.insufficientFundsForGas: Insufficient funds to pay for gas
composableErrors.executeRejectedByContract:
Execution rejected by the smart contract. Possible reasons:
• Proposal has already been executed
• Proposal has been cancelled
• Quorum not reached
• Proposal is not active
composableErrors.cancelRejectedByContract:
Cancellation rejected by the smart contract. Possible reasons:
• Proposal has already been cancelled
• Proposal has already been executed
• Proposal is not active
• Insufficient permissions to cancel

treasury.description: DLE treasury — financial management, deposits, withdrawals, and dividends

timelock.description: Execution delays — securing critical operations via timelocks

reader.description: DLE data reader — API for contract and proposal information

communication.description: Communications — messages, calls, and conversation history between members

application.description: Manage application function calls via proposals and voting

mint.description: Mint new DLE tokens — create additional tokens via governance

burn.description: Burn DLE tokens — reduce total supply via governance

oracle.description: External data integration — automation based on IoT, APIs, and sensors

inheritance.description: Token inheritance — automatic transfer of tokens to beneficiaries

vesting.description: Token vesting — gradual unlock of tokens on a schedule

staking.description: Token staking — earn rewards by holding tokens

insurance.description: Token insurance — protection against risks and losses

compliance.description: Regulatory compliance — KYC/AML, taxes, and audit

supplychain.description: Supply chain — tracking and tokenization of logistics

event.description: Events module — tokenization of events and activities

hierarchicalVoting.description: Hierarchical voting — a DLE can vote in other DLEs based on token ownership
